expectations.text: Camera Y position is approximately 66 inches (5.5 ft eye height above floor at Z=0)
expectations.evidence: position.y = 66 inches — exactly 5.5 ft eye height

expectations.text: Camera position is near the front face of the building (Z small/near-zero or slightly positive)
expectations.evidence: position.z = 5 — just 5 inches inside the front wall

expectations.text: lookAt target points inward along building depth (Z positive / into building), not outward
expectations.evidence: lookAt.z = 240 inches (20 ft inward) — correctly oriented into the building

expectations.text: GSAP animation or easeInOutCubic lerp used for the camera transition (not an instant snap)
expectations.evidence: gsap.to() used with ease: 'power2.inOut' (easeInOutCubic equivalent) for both position and target

expectations.text: Integration into the existing preset view table shown with Preset name 'Walkthrough'
expectations.evidence: CAMERA_PRESETS array shown with 'Walkthrough' entry added alongside Front, Back, Top, Isometric etc.

expectations.text: OrbitControls target updated to a point inside the building (not left at exterior default)
expectations.evidence: gsap.to(startTarget) animates controls.target to lookAt point (72, 66, 240) inside building

expectations.text: Camera config follows project standards: FOV 50, near 0.1, far 5000
expectations.evidence: Explicitly states these values and notes maxPolarAngle relaxation for interior use
